title: After the Japan Cup: Dreams Come True

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin, who loves running more than anyone,
takes on the international competition and wins
the Japan Cup in spectacular fashion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The venue rumbles as the crowd chants her name.
And she answers their calls directly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her family, friends, fans—they all see a dream in
her. And Ines is enjoying that dream more than
anyone...
